title: Reduction (Deprecated)
description: A new way to obtain Minerals
body:
**A new way to obtain Diamonds and Netherite by compressing coal and gold**

```
Changelog:
2.0.0 Release Candidate-1 (2.RC.1): Patched textures not loading and crafting recipes not showing
1.0.0: first release
```
